name: euroclaw-workspace
description: An embeddable governed AI agent runtime
author: Konstantin Ponomarev

scripts.check:test-layout: f=$(find packages -path '*/node_modules' -prune -o -path '*/src/*' \( -name '*.test.ts' -o -name '*.test-d.ts' \) -print); if [ -n "$f" ]; then echo 'ERROR: tests must live in <pkg>/tests/, not src/:'; echo "$f"; exit 1; fi
